'''gashutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uveoretinitis|uveoretinitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uveoretinitis|uveoretinitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gashutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæshitith|gæshitith]] || [[word:gæshitij|gæshitij]] || [[word:gæshitish|gæshitish]] || [[word:gæshiti|gæshiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashushututh|gashushututh]] || [[word:gashushutuj|gashushutuj]] || [[word:gashushutush|gashushutush]] || [[word:gashushutu|gashushutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashututh|gashututh]] || [[word:gashutuj|gashutuj]] || [[word:gashutush|gashutush]] || [[word:gashutu|gashutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashuftuth|gashuftuth]] || [[word:gashuftuj|gashuftuj]] || [[word:gashuftush|gashuftush]] || [[word:gashuftuf|gashuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashututhu|gashututhu]] || [[word:gashutuju|gashutuju]] || [[word:gashutushu|gashutushu]] || [[word:gashutuku|gashutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashututh|gashututh]] || [[word:gashutuj|gashutuj]] || [[word:gashutush|gashutush]] || [[word:gashutu|gashutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashututhul|gashututhul]] || [[word:gashutujul|gashutujul]] || [[word:gashutushul|gashutushul]] || [[word:gashutukul|gashutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashututhuthu|gashututhuthu]] || [[word:gashutujuju|gashutujuju]] || [[word:gashutushushu|gashutushushu]] || [[word:gashutuku|gashutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashututhun|gashututhun]] || [[word:gashutujun|gashutujun]] || [[word:gashutushun|gashutushun]] || [[word:gashutukun|gashutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashututhuoro|gashututhuoro]] || [[word:gashutujuoro|gashutujuoro]] || [[word:gashutushuoro|gashutushuoro]] || [[word:gashutukuoro|gashutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
